items.title: Nets could still have around $40M in cap space to use in free agency, pending how they time out acquiring Julius Randle.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Nets could still have around $40M in cap space to use in free agency, pending how they time out acquiring Julius Randle.

The signing of Day'Ron Sharpe will come after Nets have used their cap space, either through the Room Exception or remaining cap space, similiar to last year.

items.title: With Julius Randle and Naz Reid elsewhere, I wonder where Minnesota will look for frontcourt depth.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
With Julius Randle and Naz Reid elsewhere, I wonder where Minnesota will look for frontcourt depth.

Jalen Smith is an interesting name.

The catch? 

Smith is the Bulls' best floor-spacing big, making his value to Chicago more complicated than it was a few days ago.

items.title: T-Mac Wasn't Holding Back About Julius Randle 😳 | Cousins
items.author: Cousins with Vince Carter & Tracy McGrady
items.body_excerpt: Tracy McGrady did NOT hide his feelings about Julius Randle's performance during the playoffs this year. 🫣 "Whatever you went through with the organization, you gotta put that shit aside because you made yourself look BAD, bro." #nba #basketball #tracymcgrady #podcast…

items.title: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Isaiah Evans with the No. 33 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Evans is headed to the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team trade, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Bulls.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Isaiah Evans with the No. 33 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Evans is headed to the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team trade, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Bulls.
